page: Microsoft Azure M176bds_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family. It features 176 dedicated vCPUs mapped from 88 physical Intel Xeon 8473C cores running at 4.0 GHz. The processor includes a 105 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX). The system is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 8.73 GB of RAM per core. Local storage consists of a 410 GB disk, and the instance is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark results place this server in the top tier for multi-core processing and memory bandwidth. Multi-core stress-ng and Passmark CPU scores rank in the top 10 percent, driven by the high core count and 4.0 GHz clock speed. Memory read bandwidth reaches 11579.05 GB/sec for cached blocks and 432.14 GB/sec for uncached blocks, both representing top-tier performance. Database operations and Redis SET operations, achieving 170.86 million operations per second, also rank in the top 10 percent, indicating highly efficient memory and instruction execution. Single-core performance is average, showing that the server's strength lies in parallelized execution.

Given its massive memory capacity and high vCPU count, this server offers high resource density for enterprise-scale deployments. It is qualitatively cost-effective for consolidating large workloads that would otherwise require multiple smaller instances. The hardware configuration is highly suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores like Redis, heavy multi-threaded software compilation, and data-dense enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure M176bds_v3 is a high-capacity, memory-optimized server powered by 176 dedicated vCPUs from Intel Xeon 8473C processors running at 4.0 GHz. Built on x86_64 architecture, it features 1536.0 GB of RAM and a 410 GB local storage drive with Premium Storage support. The server delivers top-tier multi-core performance, outstanding memory bandwidth, and exceptional database execution speeds, as evidenced by its top 10 percent ranking in Passmark database tests and Redis operations. While single-core performance is average, its massive parallel processing capabilities and high memory density make it highly efficient for enterprise workloads. It is best suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and intensive multi-threaded enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M176bds_v3 is an enterprise-grade server featuring 176 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1.5 TB of RAM, and 410 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M176bds_v3 features 176 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1536 GB RAM, and top-tier multi-core and database performance for enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory and compute platform engineered for massive parallel workloads, large-scale databases, and high-throughput in-memory applications.
bullet_points: 176 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8473C processors at 4.0 GHz
1536.0 GB of system memory for memory-intensive enterprise applications
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth benchmark performance
410 GB local storage with Premium Storage capability
Optimized for large-scale databases, Redis, and multi-threaded workloads
